framework.name: Regulatory Timeline Absence as Design Choice
framework.description: NIST AI RMF deliberately avoids prescribing measurement timelines, meaning gap_5's hypothesis (that regulatory mandates would force timeline data) is falsified. Even the US government's primary AI governance framework punts on 'when' — it only addresses 'what' and 'how'. This is intentional flexibility, not an oversight.
framework.raw_quote: What should be measured depends on the purpose, audience, and needs of the evaluations

source.title: Measure - AIRC - NIST AI Resource Center
